---
title: "Publications"
---

## 📰 Journal Articles

::: {.publication-list}

::: {.publication-item}
<div class="publication-title">
  <a href="#" class="stretched-link" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;">Comparative Analysis of Machine Learning Algorithms for Land Use Land Cover Classification</a>
</div>

::: {.publication-main}
::: {.publication-image}
![](https://placehold.co/600x400/1a5f7a/ffffff?text=Journal+Article)
:::

::: {.publication-body}
<div class="publication-authors">**Pradhan, P.**, et al. (In Press)</div>
<div class="publication-journal">International Journal of Remote Sensing</div>
<div class="publication-overview">
This upcoming article explores the efficiency of various machine learning models, including Random Forest, SVM, and Neural Networks, in classifying complex urban and rural landscapes using multi-temporal satellite imagery.
</div>
<div class="publication-actions">
  <a href="#" class="capsule-btn btn-download">
    <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download
  </a>
  <a href="#" class="capsule-btn btn-doi">
    <i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> DOI
  </a>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.publication-item}
<div class="publication-title">
  <a href="#" class="stretched-link" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;">Spatial Modeling of Groundwater Potential Zones using Multi-Criteria Decision Analysis</a>
</div>

::: {.publication-main}
::: {.publication-image}
![](https://placehold.co/600x400/219150/ffffff?text=Journal+Article)
:::

::: {.publication-body}
<div class="publication-authors">**Pradhan, P.** (Under Review)</div>
<div class="publication-journal">Water Resources Management</div>
<div class="publication-overview">
A comprehensive study on mapping groundwater potential zones by integrating geological, hydrological, and climatic factors through advanced spatial modeling techniques within a GIS framework.
</div>
<div class="publication-actions">
  <a href="#" class="capsule-btn btn-download">
    <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download
  </a>
  <a href="#" class="capsule-btn btn-doi">
    <i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> DOI
  </a>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

:::

<br>

## 📚 Book Chapters

::: {.publication-list}

::: {.publication-item}
<div class="publication-title">
  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/390714931_Application_of_analytic_hierarchy_process_for_mapping_flood_vulnerability_in_Odisha_using_Google_Earth_Engine" class="stretched-link" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;">Application of analytic hierarchy process for mapping flood vulnerability in Odisha using Google Earth Engine</a>
</div>

::: {.publication-main}
::: {.publication-image}
![](publications/AHP_Normalized.jpg)
:::

::: {.publication-body}
<div class="publication-authors">**Pradhan, P.** (2025)</div>
<div class="publication-journal">In Google Earth Engine and Artificial Intelligence for Earth Observation, Elsevier</div>
<div class="publication-overview">
This research utilizes the Analytic Hierarchy Process (AHP) within the Google Earth Engine environment to map flood vulnerability in Odisha, India. By integrating various geomorphological and climatic parameters, the study produces high-resolution vulnerability maps to assist in disaster management and mitigation strategies.
</div>
<div class="publication-actions">
  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/390714931_Application_of_analytic_hierarchy_process_for_mapping_flood_vulnerability_in_Odisha_using_Google_Earth_Engine" class="capsule-btn btn-download">
    <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download
  </a>
  <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/b978-0-443-27372-8.00025-8" class="capsule-btn btn-doi">
    <i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> DOI
  </a>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.publication-item}
<div class="publication-title">
  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/384435525_Agricultural_drought_monitoring_using_Google_Earth_Engine_a_study_of_Paschim_Medinipur_district_West_Bengal" class="stretched-link" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;">Agricultural drought monitoring using Google Earth Engine: a study of Paschim Medinipur district, West Bengal</a>
</div>

::: {.publication-main}
::: {.publication-image}
![](publications/drought_ndvi.jpeg)
:::

::: {.publication-body}
<div class="publication-authors">**Pradhan, P.** (2024)</div>
<div class="publication-journal">In Modern Cartography Series, Elsevier</div>
<div class="publication-overview">
This study presents a remote sensing-based approach to monitoring agricultural drought in the Paschim Medinipur district. Using long-term satellite data and vegetation indices processed on the cloud, we analyze spatiotemporal drought patterns and their impact on local agriculture.
</div>
<div class="publication-actions">
  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/384435525_Agricultural_drought_monitoring_using_Google_Earth_Engine_a_study_of_Paschim_Medinipur_district_West_Bengal" class="capsule-btn btn-download">
    <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download
  </a>
  <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/b978-0-443-23890-1.00011-6" class="capsule-btn btn-doi">
    <i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> DOI
  </a>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

:::

<br>

## 🎤 Conference Presentations

::: {.publication-list}

::: {.publication-item}
<div class="publication-title">
  <a href="https://gdg.community.dev/events/details/google-gdg-for-earth-engine-nairobi-presents-drought-monitoring-with-google-earth-engine-ai-assistant-powered-by-gemini-api/" class="stretched-link" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;">Drought Monitoring with GEE AI Assistant powered by Gemini API</a>
</div>

::: {.publication-main}
::: {.publication-image}
![](https://placehold.co/600x400/1a5f7a/ffffff?text=Nairobi+Workshop)
:::

::: {.publication-body}
<div class="publication-authors">**Pradhan, P.** (2024)</div>
<div class="publication-journal">GDG for Earth Engine Nairobi (Virtual)</div>
<div class="publication-overview">
A demonstration of integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) with geospatial platforms. This workshop showcases how a Gemini-powered AI assistant can streamline complex GEE coding tasks for drought monitoring, making cloud-based remote sensing more accessible to researchers.
</div>
<div class="publication-actions">
  <a href="https://gdg.community.dev/events/details/google-gdg-for-earth-engine-nairobi-presents-drought-monitoring-with-google-earth-engine-ai-assistant-powered-by-gemini-api/" class="capsule-btn btn-download">
    <i class="bi bi-presentation-ctnr"></i> Download
  </a>
  <a href="https://gdg.community.dev/events/details/google-gdg-for-earth-engine-nairobi-presents-drought-monitoring-with-google-earth-engine-ai-assistant-powered-by-gemini-api/" class="capsule-btn btn-doi">
    <i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> DOI
  </a>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

:::

<br>

## 🖼️ Posters

::: {.publication-list}

::: {.publication-item}
<div class="publication-title">
  <a href="#" class="stretched-link" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;">Real-time Flood Monitoring using Sentinel-1 SAR Data and GEE</a>
</div>

::: {.publication-main}
::: {.publication-image}
![](https://placehold.co/600x400/d35400/ffffff?text=Poster+Presentation)
:::

::: {.publication-body}
<div class="publication-authors">**Pradhan, P.** (2023)</div>
<div class="publication-journal">National Symposium on Remote Sensing, India</div>
<div class="publication-overview">
This poster presentation highlights the use of Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) data for mapping flood inundated areas in near real-time, providing critical information for emergency response.
</div>
<div class="publication-actions">
  <a href="#" class="capsule-btn btn-download">
    <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-image"></i> Download
  </a>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

:::

<br>

---

Full publication lists available via:

[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_DhEQHEAAAAJ){.social-btn}
[<i class="bi bi-person-badge"></i> ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Pulakesh-Pradhan){.social-btn}
